connectorUiConfig.title: Island V2 (using REST API)
connectorUiConfig.descriptionMarkdown: The [Island](https://www.island.io) V2 data connector allows you to connect to your Island instance and ingest logs into Microsoft Sentinel. The data connector is built on Microsoft Sentinel's Codeless Connector Platform and uses the Island V3 API to fetch security events and supports DCR-based [ingestion time transformations](https://docs.microsoft.com/azure/azure-monitor/logs/custom-logs-overview).

sampleQueries.query:
Island_UserEvents_V2_CL
 | sort by TimeGenerated desc
 | take 10

Island_AdminEvents_V2_CL
 | sort by TimeGenerated desc
 | take 10

Island_SystemEvents_V2_CL
 | sort by TimeGenerated desc
 | take 10

union Island_UserEvents_V2_CL, Island_AdminEvents_V2_CL, Island_SystemEvents_V2_CL
 | summarize count()

dataTypes.name: Island_UserEvents_V2_CL
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
Island_UserEvents_V2_CL
 | summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
 | where isnotempty(Time)

dataTypes.name: Island_AdminEvents_V2_CL
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
Island_AdminEvents_V2_CL
 | summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
 | where isnotempty(Time)

dataTypes.name: Island_SystemEvents_V2_CL
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
Island_SystemEvents_V2_CL
 | summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
 | where isnotempty(Time)

resourceProvider.permissionsDisplayText: Read and Write permissions are required.

Read permissions to shared keys for the workspace are required. [See the documentation to learn more about workspace keys](https://docs.microsoft.com/azure/azure-monitor/platform/agent-windows#obtain-workspace-id-and-key)

customs.name: Island API Key
customs.description: An Island API key is required. Generate the API Key and connector ID in the Island Management Console under SIEM > SENTINEL.

instructionSteps.description:
To enable the Island V2 connector for Microsoft Sentinel, provide the required information below and click on Connect.
>
instructionSteps.title: Connect Island V2 to Microsoft Sentinel
